title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Byju's Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Byju's Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's Digital Technologies in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's Digital Technologies:
Byju's Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's Digital Technologies!
